content.en:
"Longqin Palace Master, it's just a clone, even if it is lost, it will be lost!"

Ye Tian said indifferently.

The Longqin Palace Master was a little surprised, even if it was a clone, but at the level of the Supreme Dao Realm, it was difficult for any clone to be refined, the price paid was too great, and most of the clones that were refined were very flawed, and they were not as strong as the ontology.

Therefore, even if there is a doppelganger, even if there is a doppelganger, there is no one to be willing to do it!

But Ye Tian didn't care about the clone at all.

She guessed that the price of Ye Tian's refining clone should not be large, but she didn't continue to ask.

"Okay, I'll apply to the Taisu Palace Master and I'll let you know when the time comes!" said the Longqin Palace Master.

"Thank you, Longqin Palace Master!"

Ye Tian was grateful.

......

Taisu Palace.

When the Longqin Palace Master came back from the battlefield, he immediately went to see the Taisu Palace Master and personally told the Taisu Palace Master about the situation.

Of course, she had been summoned before she returned.

"Ye Tian wants to enter the Void Domain's Glass Light Rift, and I allow this matter!"

Taisu said.

Subsequently, Taisu asked the Longqin Palace Lord to inform Ye Tian that Ye Tian's clone would come to Taisu Palace, and she would personally take Ye Tian into the Void Domain.

Soon.

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and came to the Taisu Palace, where he saw the Taisu Palace Master, the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm.

"I've seen the Taisu Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, Long Qin has already told me about it, if you want to enter the Glass Light Rift, I can't take you there, I can only send you into the Void Domain, and you will have to rely on yourself later!" Tai Su reminded.

"Yes!"

Ye Tianying said.

Whew!!

Ye Tian followed the Taisu Palace Master from the Taisu Palace and went to a weak point in the space node of the Infinite Domain.

On the road.

Tai Su introduced to Ye Tian: "There are basically only two ways to leave the Infinite Domain, the first way is the Domain Gate, you can leave the Infinite Domain through the Domain Gate, the Domain Gate connects to other Innate Origin Domains, and also connects to a few fortresses. Outside the fortress is the Void Domain, which can naturally be easily entered. The second method is to break the nodes of the Infinite Domain, but the normal nodes cannot be broken without the strength of the Eightfold Dao Realm, and there are only a few weak nodes, and the Sevenfold Dao Realm can be broken for an instant. But if you want to come back, you have to contact me in advance, and I will break the node and let you come back in an instant. "

"Okay!" Ye Tian understood.

After some time, they finally came to a weak point in the space.

"Here we go!"

The seventh sequence of supreme rules appeared on the Taisu Palace Master's body, and the terrifying aura spread, making Ye Tiandu extremely shocked.

This power is too terrifying, and it is estimated that a trace of it can suppress the ordinary Sixfold Dao Realm.

The gap between the sixfold supreme Dao realm and the sevenfold supreme Dao realm is too big, it's a world of difference!

"Broken!"

The Taisu Palace Master held a seven-pattern Dao long sword, and cast the seventh sequence of Dao supernatural powers, piercing the space node with a sword.

"In the past!"

The Taisu Palace Lord shouted.

Ye Tian no longer hesitated, and followed the broken space node and fled directly.

......

Imaginary domain.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, he sensed the Infinite Domain again, and found that the Infinite Domain was an unimaginably large area, like a huge prison, sealing everything off.

And in the extreme distance, there are bright spots, which must be other innate primordial domains.

"Copy the real body first, a few more real bodies, fall one, and you can continue to explore!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon.

One after another, the real body copied the body, condensed, and then dispersed.

He had to find a slightly safe place to make sure one of the True Replica bodies didn't fall, while the other True Replica bodies rushed to the Glass Light Rift.

Airplanes!!!

A map appeared, this map was the map of the void given to him by Taisu Palace, recording the location of the Liguang rift and the location of the Luohe fortress.

The Luohe Fortress has been breached, but if you want to go to the Liguang Rift, it is best to go through the Luohe Fortress.

Subsequently.

He kept shuttling and rushing to the Luohe fortress.

On the road.

Thundered!!!!

There was the sound of battle.

Then.

He sensed that a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons were fighting against some Supreme Dao Realms.

If the Luohe Fortress was not breached, the Supreme Dao Void Demons would not be able to attack here, but now there are a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons here, but the Supreme Dao Realm of the Innate Origin Domain will definitely have to find a way to drive away this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons and rebuild the Luohe Fortress.

Ye Tian didn't help these Supreme Dao Realms, but bypassed, his goal was to remove the Glass Light Rift, and everything else was secondary.

However, sometimes if you are unlucky, you will encounter the terrifying Supreme Dao Realm.

Before he could react, a terrifying Supreme Void Demon hand grabbed from the void.

Click!

His body was crushed.

"Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon!"

Ye Tian was speechless, he actually encountered a sevenfold supreme Dao Void Demon, and he was killed in seconds without any resistance.

This should be one of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons who broke through the Luohe Fortress.

"Now in this area, it seems that the Supreme Dao Void Demon has a greater advantage, so it is better to copy another double Supreme Dao Demon, so it may be safer. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, the real body copy body also continues to be dispatched, and as long as one copy body reaches the glass light rift, it is victory.

And even if it is a supreme realm monster, if it is unlucky to encounter other supreme realms, it is useless to explain, and it will be directly killed by the other party.

After some time.

Ye Tian gradually approached the Luohe Fortress.

this day.

Ye Tian finally arrived at the Luohe Fortress.

"It's time to the Luohe Fortress!"

Ye Tian looked at the Luohe Fortress, which had already collapsed at this time, and the area seemed to be like broken glass, and there were fragments of the Luohe Fortress everywhere.

Moreover, there are still many corpses of the Supreme Dao Realm and even the Supreme Dao Void Demons here.

Of course, all the treasures on their bodies were scraped away, and there was nothing left.

Ye Tian found an area on the edge of the Luohe Fortress and crossed over through a gap.

When you get there, the chance of encountering the Supreme Void Demon is much higher.

So.

Ye Tian was going to go to the Glass Light Rift with the identity of the Dao Monster's copy body, so that the chance of survival was higher.

As time passed, Ye Tian got closer and closer to the glass light rift, and he became more and more excited.

This means that he is getting closer and closer to comprehending the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme paths!

this day.

Ye Tian finally saw the glass light rift, this crack was extremely huge, but there was no supreme path void demon around.

After all, entering the Liguang Rift could indeed comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, but the success rate was too low, and the mortality rate was very high.

Moreover, it is only when the eighth sequence of supreme path rules is comprehended to the ten-percent realm that they will come here to comprehend.

So, not many Supreme Void Demons would come here.
